title: OpenAI Added GPT-Realtime-2, Translate, And Whisper Voice API Models
summary: OpenAI announced three Realtime API voice models: GPT-Realtime-2 for reasoning voice agents, GPT-Realtime-Translate for live translation, and GPT-Realtime-Whisper for streaming transcription, with token and per-minute pricing.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Update Realtime API model allowlists, latency tests, tool-call tests, and voice-agent evaluation suites before routing customer traffic to the new models.

estimated_cost_effect.magnitude: GPT-Realtime-2: $32/1M audio input tokens, $0.40/1M cached input tokens, $64/1M audio output tokens; Translate: $0.034/min; Whisper: $0.017/min
estimated_cost_effect.basis: OpenAI announcement pricing and availability section.

impacts.recommended_action: Separate token-priced realtime voice usage from per-minute translation and transcription usage in billing dashboards.
Review context-window, tool-call, reasoning-effort, and interruption-handling behavior before replacing earlier realtime models.

detail.migration_notes: This event records Realtime API model availability and listed pricing. APW does not assert tenant entitlement, regional availability, or compatibility with every existing realtime client.

limitations: Pricing is recorded from the announcement; consumers should check the pricing page before billing-sensitive launches.
No raw announcement body is copied into APW.
